programme.title: Taste Selebriti

programme.title: Rumah Memori

programme.title: Kisah Tok Kadi S2

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go

programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular menyelesaikan tugasan sambil diganggu dengan cabaran yang melucukan. Kumpulan manakah yang bakal berjaya?

programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang kehidupan di sebuah kampung moden yang sudah semakin terdedah dengan kemodenan tetapi dalam waktu yang sama masih mengekalkan ciri-ciri hidup berkampung.

programme.title: Dapur Bapak Bapak

Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A diligent scientist invents an innovative machine that drops food from the sky to help his fellow residents. Chaos ensues when the machine becomes uncontrollable.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Man seeks the help of Doctor Strange to forget his exposed secret identity as Peter Parker. However, Strange's spell goes horribly wrong, leading to unwanted guests entering their universe.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita and Little Rock set out on a mission to protect the rest of humanity by fighting evolved zombies while also battling their own internal demons.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: Judgement Day has occurred and skynet has all but exterminated modern society. Now John Connor leads the resistance against skynet but is unsure of victory until he encounters Marcus Wright.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock tries to revive his failing career by interviewing a serial killer, Cletus Kasady, who is on death row. When Carnage gains control over Cletus's body, he escapes from the prison.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

programme.title: Metallic Rouge
programme.desc: An android named Nean Rouge with a human investigator Naomi Orthmann pursue rebel dissidents to Mars in a thrilling chase.

programme.title: The God of High School
programme.desc: Martial artist Mori Jin enters a tournament that will crown the greatest fighter among Korean high school students. However, the competition hides a secret known only to a politician watching it.

programme.title: I'm in Love with the Villainess
programme.desc: Rei Ohashi, an overworked employee, passes away after which she is reincarnated as Rae Taylor, her favourite video game's heroine, and gets attracted to Claire Francois, the main antagonist.

programme.title: Robotics;Notes
programme.desc: In a world where augmented reality is almost real, two students named Kaito and Akiho face a big problem. However, they try hard to save their robot friend from danger.

programme.title: Robotics;Notes
programme.desc: In a world where augmented reality is almost real, two students named Kaito and Akiho face a big problem. However, they try hard to save their robot friend from danger.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Robert McCall gives up violence and wishes to lead a quiet life. However, brutal events force him to take up the fight for justice once again.

programme.title: The Retirement Plan
programme.desc: When their involvement with the wrong people puts her and her family at risk, Ashley turns to her estranged father for help, who is living a retired life in the Cayman Islands.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: A subway dispatcher's day is thrown into chaos when four armed men hijack the subway train and take the commuters as hostages. They demand USD 10 million from the mayor as ransom.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A woman takes a cab ride back home from the airport. En route, she unexpectedly has an insightful conversation with the driver regarding the important relationships in life.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: After completing his sentence, a former convict sets out to avenge his brother's murder. As he blazes a trail of violence and vengeance, he is pursued by two police officers and an assassin.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: What begins as an instant attraction for Ben and Bea quickly takes a nosedive, culminating in a tense reunion at a wedding they both attend six months later.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: Ageing bad boys Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett manoeuvre midlife crises, high-speed chases, and explosive collisions with an enemy who can set the world on fire to avenge Benito.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Hellboy is a demonic warrior who protects the Earth from paranormal threats. When an enemy from his past makes a comeback, it is up to him and his team to stop the villain once and for all.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

programme.title: Hollow Man
programme.desc: Sebastian Caine, a scientist, develops an invisibility serum. However, when he uses it on himself and is unable to reverse the effects, it results in horrifying consequences.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With the Zohan
programme.desc: Zohan, an Israeli anti-terrorist commando, stages his own death when he gets tired of his job and goes to New York City to follow his dream of being a hairstylist.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: K, an officer with the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a secret that could create chaos. He goes in search of a former Blade Runner who has been missing for over three decades.

programme.desc: A game warden pursues a murdering madman.

programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Unbending Mr. Fang
programme.desc: Fang Shiyu, a martial artist, decides to exact revenge on the corrupt officials who falsefully accuse and frame in a case of corruption.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: A martial artist decides to have a low profile following his humiliating loss to the famous Ip Man. However, circumstances put him in the crosshairs of a powerful drug smuggler.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: Samson, a Nazirite takes on the role of rescuing Israelites from the oppression. However, he soon finds himself caught up in the evil machinations of a prince, which leads him to seek revenge.

programme.title: Finding Nemo
programme.desc: With the help of a forgetful fish, Marlin, a clown fish, embarks on a journey to find his son, Nemo, after losing him in the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria, and Melman are back and still trying to return to New York. When their journey brings them to Europe, they use a travelling circus as the perfect cover.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Alita, a battle cyborg, is resurrected by Ido, a doctor, who finds out that she has the soul of a teenager. Later, she sets out to uncover her past and find her true identity.

programme.title: Shark Island
programme.desc: Four friends in a resort island have to save themselves from genetically modified sharks while trying to find a cure in a nearby research centre.

programme.title: Bolt
programme.desc: Bolt is a dog who stars in a superhit television show in which he possesses superpowers. However, things change when he believes his powers are real and embarks on a purposeful mission.

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: A valley threatened by flooding forces Manny, Sid and Diego into an adventure across a changing world, where danger and discovery go hand in hand.

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: A high-powered editor forces her young assistant to marry her in order to avoid deportation.

programme.title: King Of Serpant
programme.desc: A man's small village faces certain death unless he kills a giant python. So, he leads the hunt against the beast to keep his village safe.

programme.title: Cosmoball
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a galactic war that shattered the moon and shifted Earth's poles, a massive spaceship named 'Cosmoball' hovers ominously above the planet.

programme.title: Ghost Shark
programme.desc: After a great white shark devours a fisherman's potential catch, he and his daughter kill it in retaliation. However, the shark returns as a ghost, seeking vengeance on the town of Smallport.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Seven Swords
programme.desc: Terror of a snake demon reigns in Changshou City as the residents battle lethal attacks. So, the Descendants of the Seven Swords must defeat the malefic creature and restore peace.

programme.title: Ice Age
programme.desc: Manny the mammoth, Sid the loquacious sloth, and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger go on a comical quest to return a human baby back to his father, across a world on the brink of an ice age.

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: This is Film - Action Category.

programme.title: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: Edward, a business executive, meets a struggling prostitute, Vivian, and hires her to stay with him for a week. However, things take unexpected turns when he falls in love with her.

programme.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest
programme.desc: Captain Jack Sparrow seeks the heart of Davy Jones, a mythical pirate, in order to avoid being enslaved to him. However, others, including his friends Will and Elizabeth, want it for their own gain.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: The vacation of Hercule Poirot, a Belgian detective, is cut short as he investigates the murder of an heiress who was shot dead during her honeymoon.

programme.title: Mojin The Treasure Valley
programme.desc: In search of a curse breaker, tomb raider Hu Bayi and his team set out to look for the lost tomb of Emperor Xian on a monster-infested island.

programme.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
programme.desc: Gustave, a concierge at a European hotel, must prove his innocence after he is framed for murdering an elderly dowager with whom he had a sexual relationship.

programme.title: Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Searching for a lost comrade, astronaut Leo plunges into a cosmic anomaly. Soon, he awakens on an alien world where evolved primates reign supreme over humans.
